nasb.text: and the remainder of the number of bowmen, the mighty men of the sons of Kedar, will be few; for the Lord God of Israel has spoken.”

esv.text: And the remainder of the archers of the mighty men of the sons of Kedar will be few, for the Lord, the God of Israel, has spoken.”

cnv.text: 弓箭手剩餘的人數，就是基達人的勇士，必定很少；這是耶和華以色列的　神說的。”

ccb.text: 勇敢的弓箭手必所剩无几。这是以色列的上帝耶和华说的。”

csbs.text: 基达人中残余的勇猛弓箭手，人数必稀少。”这是以色列的神耶和华说的。
